name: Start Of LunHui
short_description: The main character is reborn. Can he live?
detailed_description:
White Stone Village can not be saved after the start of the battle, you need to manually save before 8 am the next day, or through the novice village, after entering the battle can not be saved.

After 8 o 'clock the next day, you need to find the soldier to get a set of equipment, preferably with a bow and arrow, and hide in the protective cover next to the battle while playing the three stages of Goblin.

We want to make a world, so this should be a survival game, although the difficulty of survival is very low, very little content, please look forward to it.

We used a time limit -- the time of the game goes by at a rate of 60:1, and players can practice, study, sleep, and so on to make time jumps.

We designed agility -- the enemy's movement speed and attack frequency, as well as time lapse, were scaled to agility. If the player's agility is 10 and the enemy's is 20, from the player's point of view, the enemy approaches the player twice as fast and then attacks twice as often. Instead, the enemy will appear in slow motion.
about_the_game:
White Stone Village can not be saved after the start of the battle, you need to manually save before 8 am the next day, or through the novice village, after entering the battle can not be saved.

After 8 o 'clock the next day, you need to find the soldier to get a set of equipment, preferably with a bow and arrow, and hide in the protective cover next to the battle while playing the three stages of Goblin.

We want to make a world, so this should be a survival game, although the difficulty of survival is very low, very little content, please look forward to it.

We used a time limit -- the time of the game goes by at a rate of 60:1, and players can practice, study, sleep, and so on to make time jumps.

We designed agility -- the enemy's movement speed and attack frequency, as well as time lapse, were scaled to agility. If the player's agility is 10 and the enemy's is 20, from the player's point of view, the enemy approaches the player twice as fast and then attacks twice as often. Instead, the enemy will appear in slow motion.
